strongest_claim_proved: The exact Lean carrier KTGlyph.Glyph has cardinality 42.
stronger_claim_open: Concrete PSL(2,7) invariance; physical exhaustiveness of the 42 glyphs.
notes: The count is relative to the framed Fano law encoded in OperationNormalForm.

strongest_claim_proved: The exact Lean carrier KTMonad.Monad has cardinality 168.
stronger_claim_open: Concrete PSL(2,7) action; canonical identification of monads with group elements; physical interpretation of the four walk realizations.
notes: The theorem proves 42 glyphs times four walk states equals 168.

strongest_claim_proved: The explicitly specified routed quaternion-block multiplication equals the independently defined Cayley-Dickson product for all inputs.
stronger_claim_open: Independent Pascal-mod-3 forcing; uniqueness of the routing datum; doubled norm composition; alternativity; explicit nonzero associator witness.
notes: The current selector, route, and orientation datum was target-informed.

strongest_claim_proved: The doubled quaternion carrier has scalar dimension 8 and reaches the explicitly defined maximal Hurwitz dimension.
stronger_claim_open: Full Hurwitz classification; norm composition on the doubled carrier; failure of composition beyond dimension 8.
notes: This is a dimension theorem about a constructed carrier, not the full classification theorem.

strongest_claim_proved: One explicit deterministic complete-state system has a noninjective local projection and residue-sensitive evolution, hence quasi-stochastic visible dynamics.
stronger_claim_open: Canonicality of the witness transition; concrete frame invariance; Born rule; empirical quantum statistics.
notes: The result is an existence theorem, not a universal claim about all KT dynamics.

strongest_claim_proved: Any invariant scalar projection is constant on the orbits of the supplied lawful frame action.
stronger_claim_open: Construction of the concrete PSL(2,7) action; proof that all claimed physical scalar observables are invariant.
notes: This is the cleanest theorem in the current axiom-audit sample.

strongest_claim_proved: Any physically admissible invariant observable descends to a well-defined function on the monad orbit quotient.
stronger_claim_open: Concrete PSL(2,7) action; proof that the quotient is the physically correct state space; audit of all existing monad observables.
notes: The theorem formalizes the no-preferred-trivialization principle.
